text.title: Axum Router Setup
text.summary: Axum Router construction with nested routes, AppState injection, middleware layering, and main.rs wiring.

example.note: AppState derives Clone and holds Arc fields. Router layers middleware before `with_state`. tracing_subscriber initialized first.
Each resource gets its own routes module. Routes only wire URLs to handlers — no logic here.

section.title: AppError

example.note: Single AppError enum. From impls for validator and sqlx errors. IntoResponse maps each variant to the correct HTTP status.

section.reference: Bootstrap script: cargo init, add deps, create module skeleton and error.rs
